Malevolent Runeblade  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +5
Effect: Froglok Poison (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 4.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +5
Effect: Froglok Poison (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 4.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-09 03:07:45
Page Updated:Mon May 23rd, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58

NPC Name

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 21 2001 at 12:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ummm Y cant a SK use this when the SK armor for lvl 50+ is called malevolent armor???? hehe well just my 2cp I have a lvl 11 Sk but will be a LOOONG time before I see or even loot any of this armor
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 9:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) SKs cant use?! WTF?! God Verant are dumbass's!! the freaking armor in Velious for SKs is Malevolent so why cant we use this awsome blade?! ack verant.. BLOW ME

Yeah, Paladins can't use it either, but i'm not complaining. I mean, if every class could equip every weapon, then what whould be the point?

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 6:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What's your deal? You'd never have the chance to get one anyway ya dirty bum.

# Apr 17 2001 at 5:31 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
A warrior doesn't have to use both 1hs. He/she may use one of the 1hs blades bag the other and use this instead.

QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2001 at 8:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754507691
View User Forum
74 posts
It's no drop your not gonna get this untill you are upper 50's, no way no how. If anyone can sneek a twink in to veeshans I stand corrected. It would be nice if it had one or two more points of dammage though.
▲ Page top
RE: Tough
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 3:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765385143
48 posts
Dex based bards are not too conserned with damage. More damage just means more agro to manage. Mostly we want the delay and the proc, with wieght factored in as we have mostly dex gear not str/sta gear like a warrior.

A perfect weapon for dex based bards.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 14 2001 at 11:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's weird how this is called "Malevolent" but can't be used by SKs, aren't they a kind of "Malevolent" bunch?

▲ Page top
RE: Holy Beggezzes
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 2:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247524215
4 posts
umm... are you an idoit? warrior/ranger epic same damage/dly
▲ Page top
RE: Holy Beggezzes
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2002 at 9:03 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593966150681
4 posts
Ahem, Earthcaller is the same Damage/Delay as both the warrior epic 1handers. Swiftwind, the second ranger epic sword is 13/21 with a permanent 40% haste spell on it. Also, Earthcaller has a 500 dot with 70 percent slow on it.

On top of this, I used Copeland's Weapon Analyzer to measure the damage that my warrior would do with warrior epic's and ranger epics (if he could use). The results are...

Blade of Strat+Blade of Tact+CoF=1293 dpm
Swiftwind+Earthcaller=1505 dpm

I used my current stats as a 52 warrior with approx 180 str in both. Therefore, as you can see the ranger epic does much more damage than warrior epic.
▲ Page top
RE: Holy Beggezzes
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2001 at 6:57 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
